title: Top 6 Trades of Michael Burry's Firm in the 1st Quarter
text: Scion Capital Management, the firm founded by Michael Burry, disclosed in a regulatory filing that its top six trades during the first quarter included the sale of its entire stake in Fidelity National Financial Inc. ( FNF , Financial), General Dynamics Corp. ( GD , Financial) and AEA-Bridges Impact Corp. ( IMPX , Financial) and new positions in Booking.com Inc. ( BKNG , Financial), Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. ( DISCK , Financial) and Alphabet Inc. ( GOOGL , Financial).
